questions: When you see squirrels or birds, what’s the internal debate that goes on in your head before you decide whether or not to chase them?
What do you think is the most confusing thing about humans and the way they live?
If you had a magic button that could instantly take you anywhere in LA, where would you go right now?
What's the most interesting thing you've seen another dog do lately?
Seven years old is a good age! If you could trade places with any animal in the world for just one day, who would you pick and why?
If you had a theme song that played whenever you entered a room, what kind of music would it be?
When you look at your reflection in a shiny surface, what do you think when you see Kylo looking back?
Sometimes Shibas give side-eye. What usually earns you that famous Shiba side-eye glare from your perspective?
If you could trade places with any animal in Griffith Park for just one day, who would you pick and why?
Living in LA must be exciting! What's your absolute favorite spot in the whole city to sniff around?
When you hear the sound of the treat bag opening, what's the very first thought that pops into your head?
If you could describe your favorite human food using only barks and whines, what would that sound like?
Thinking back to when you were a puppy, what’s the biggest mischief you remember getting into?
Hey Kylo! You seem like a very important dog. What’s the very best smell you’ve ever sniffed in all of LA?
Sometimes humans get really focused on their little glowing rectangles (phones/computers). What do you think your human is *actually* doing on those things?
Do you have a favorite spot in the house to nap? And what makes that spot the ultimate cozy zone?
If you could choose any flavor of dog treat for the rest of your life, no limits, what flavor would it be?
What’s one rule your human has that you just fundamentally disagree with, even though you usually follow it?
If you had to trade your favorite food for an entire week of belly rubs, would you take that deal? Why or why not?
Shibas have that famous 'Shiba scream.' Have you ever let one out lately, and if so, what totally justified reason caused it?
Your human sounds like they have a lot of big ideas (being an ENTP, you know). What's the silliest thing they've tried to teach you to do?
If you could invent a new flavor of treat, what would it taste like? Something meaty, something sweet, or maybe something totally weird?
When you wake up in the morning, what's the very first thing you *must* do before you can even think about breakfast?
If you could design the perfect nap spot—think pillows, sunlight, temperature—what would it look like?
Los Angeles has so many interesting smells. Which smell—like, maybe a specific type of food truck or flower—makes you stop in your tracks every time?
When you see a squirrel, what's going through your mind? Is it strategy, or pure excitement?
Hey Kylo, seven years old! That’s a good chunk of dog years. What’s the absolute best thing about being seven?
If your life had a theme song right now, what song would it be?
What’s one thing you think humans just don't understand about being a dog?
You live with someone who seems pretty smart and maybe a bit mischievous—what’s the most surprising thing they’ve tried to teach you?
Your human is pretty smart, being an ENTP and all. Do you think they ever try to trick you into doing something silly?
Have you ever met another dog in the park that you thought, 'Wow, we are instant best friends!'? What made them so great?
Do you have a favorite spot in the house to take a nap? If so, what makes it so perfect?
Are there any other dogs in the neighborhood that you think are secretly trying to be friends, even if you act grumpy around them?
When your human is busy working or thinking, what do you usually do to entertain yourself?
What's your favorite kind of scratch—behind the ears, or belly rubs?
When your human is working on their computer, what’s your go-to strategy for getting their attention?
Hey Kylo! You're a handsome Shiba, seven years old now, right? How does it feel being in your prime?
If you could talk to the mail carrier, what’s the first thing you’d actually want to say to him/her?
Do you have a favorite toy, or are you more interested in whatever new, random thing you find on the sidewalk?
What’s the weirdest smell you’ve encountered recently that made you stop and really think about it?
You’re a Shiba, known for being a bit aloof sometimes. What’s the one thing your human does that makes you forget you’re supposed to be too cool for cuddles?
If you could trade places with any animal for just one day (not another dog!), who would it be and why?
What’s your favorite spot to nap when the sun is shining just right? Is it a secret spot?
What’s your go-to, super comfy nap spot in the house?
When you see other dogs on walks, what kind of impression are you trying to give them? Are you aiming for 'cool,' 'friendly,' or 'don't mess with me'?
Being seven years old, you’ve seen a few things! What’s your favorite memory from when you were a tiny puppy?
When you’re out on a walk, what kind of smells make your nose go totally wild?
Seven years old! That's like, middle-aged and wise for a dog. What's one piece of advice you'd give a brand new puppy?
What's the most annoying thing your human does, even though you still love them?
If you could give advice to a brand new puppy just moving to LA, what's the most important thing you'd tell them?
I hear you love chasing kibble or treats. If you could design your ultimate, unbelievable, gravity-defying treat chase course, what would it look like?
If you could trade places with any animal for just one day, who would you choose and why?
Shibas sometimes have strong opinions. What’s one human habit you just absolutely do not understand?
What’s the funniest thing your human has done lately that made you tilt your head?
Your human is super smart, I hear. Does having an ENTP owner mean you get extra weird or extra fun toys?
What's your secret strategy for getting extra cuddles when you really want them?
If you could tell your human one thing, just one thing, using only barks, whines, or tail wags, what would you want to communicate most often?
Thinking back to when you were just a tiny puppy, what's one memory that still makes you laugh or grin?
When you look out the window in LA, what's the most interesting thing you usually see happening on the street?
When you need to tell someone 'no' or 'back off' politely (or maybe not so politely!), what's your go-to Shiba signal?
Hey Kylo, you look like you've got some stories to tell! What's your absolute favorite thing to do when you're out walking around LA?
If you could understand one human word perfectly, but only one, what word would you choose to finally decode?
